safe_mode_warning.title: Disable Safe Mode、
safe_mode_warning.description.one:
Safe Mode helps protect your system from potentially unsafe operations.
Disabling Safe Mode allows this pack to perform high-risk actions, such as writing files or accessing system information.
Only disable Safe Mode if you fully trust the pack author and understand the associated risks.
For more details, see [Settings -> Security Settings -> Security Details].
safe_mode_warning.description.all:
Safe Mode helps protect your system from potentially unsafe operations.
Disabling Safe Mode allows all packs to perform high-risk actions, such as writing files or accessing system information.
Only disable Safe Mode if you fully trust the authors of all installed packs and understand the associated risks.
For more details, see <fg:bright_blue>[Settings -> Security Settings -> Security Details]</fg>.
